meta.title: Live-session setup catalog (labeled ground-truth dataset)
meta.source: 14 PDFs: 'All Setups From Last Week Live Session' (~106 frames)
meta.purpose: Labeled examples of the price-action strategy, used to (a) build a knowledge base, (b) tune the bot's detection/confirmation/correlation thresholds, (c) validate the engine.
meta.method: 106 frames auto-classified into 28 clean TradingView exports (exact prices) vs 78 live webcam frames (approx). Per the 'exports only' precision choice, the dataset is built from the clean exports; webcam frames are noted qualitatively in the knowledge base. The clean exports were read representatively across all 14 files.
meta.IMPORTANT_survivorship_bias: These PDFs are a curated WINNERS-ONLY highlight reel. Every example is a win. This tells us WHAT the strategy trades (patterns, timeframes, levels, ~1:2 R:R) but NOT its real win-rate or loss behaviour. Do NOT loosen risk caps or infer edge from this set.

schema.level: key price (exact if clean export, else approx/na)

setups.notes: Two tests of 1.2237, rejection, dropped through target. Textbook resistance-retest short.
Double top at the highs, sharp drop through target.
Render too small to read pair; clear long off support that rallied into target.
Short at the retest of ~0.8175; declined to target.
Buy the pullback to support during an uptrend; continued up into target. Same pair as F01-P03 but higher TF and opposite direction (trend context differs).

setups.context: horizontal support confluence with rising trendline
setups.notes: Held 1.3620 support sitting on a rising trendline, rallied. M15 example.
Double bottom at 2.0000, broke the descending trendline, ran up. Shown on M15 and confirmed on M30.
Short the top of the move; dropped through target.
Small render; short at resistance that fell into target.
Webcam frame (approx). Long off support, rallied into target.
Webcam frame (approx). Sharp rally into target.
Webcam frame (approx). Crypto; long off trendline support.

distinct_summary.outcomes: all WIN (winners-only highlight reel — see survivorship note)
